[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0001111000 4
1 0011110101 6
2 1111110101 8
3 0100100111 5
4 0001000000 1
5 0000000000 a
6 0000000000 a
7 0000000000 a

23 32 0000001000 1

56 65 0100100101 4
67 76 0000000000 a match 5 6 7
70 07 0000000000 a match 5 6 7
